strings.string: ON = crew view (no HR / pace). OFF = runner view.
Total race duration in hours (6, 12 or 24).
Length of one loop in meters (default 1185.6).
How many loops by the fastest fictive runner fill one full revolution of the display ring (default 6).
Within this window after a lap press: 2nd quick press = caught a missed lap (+1 extra). 3+ quick presses = undo last lap. Default 5 s.
Total distance the GREEN fictive pacer covers in the full race (default 88 km = 4:05 /km at 6 h).
Total distance the RED fictive pacer covers in the full race (default 80 km = 4:30 /km at 6 h).
Total grams of carbohydrate to take per hour during the race (default 90 g).
How many servings per hour the carbs are split into (default 6 = every 10 min).
How many seconds before the next estimated loop end the FUEL alarm fires (default 60 s).
